name: Warfare : Battleground™
short_description: Join Warfare: Battleground, an arcade multiplayer first-person shooter! Fight in a variety of modes using a large arsenal of weapons and destroy your opponents with helicopters and air strikes. Are you ready for battle?
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a world of dynamic battles in the new indie game Warfare: Battleground. Play on exciting maps, including a variety of locations. Use a variety of weapons and unique equipment to summon reinforcements and deal devastating damage.

Take part in familiar childhood modes such as Point Control or Team Battle, with support for up to 16 players. The map size will adjust for each mode accordingly, creating continuous tension. Night maps add atmosphere and necessitate the use of flashlights, however they are not available for every weapon, which will force players to not get used to one weapon.

The complex shooting and weapon control mechanics will require you to have fast reaction times and extreme accuracy. Gather in co-op and destroy enemies together.

Join the development of the game together with the community. Speak your ideas, participate in the community, and you will help the developers to make the game better.

supported_languages: Russian, English, Polish, Ukrainian, Japanese, German
